content: alexcrichton requested dicej for a review on PR #12737.

alexcrichton opened PR #12737 from alexcrichton:fix-caller to bytecodealliance:main:

In #12718 I added a test for more cases but forgot to update the *.wast to actually execute the test. Turns out all the cases were failing, and so this commit properly enables the tests and then fixes them.

alexcrichton added PR #12737 Fix caller context on fused component<->component returns to the merge queue.
alexcrichton removed PR #12737 Fix caller context on fused component<->component returns from the merge queue.
